item.title: The Entertainers, Richard PrinceтБг Fulton Ryder, 2023тБг Book curation by Anthony V...
item.description:
@saintlaurentbabylone

The Entertainers, Richard PrinceтБг
Fulton Ryder, 2023тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
The Entertainers revisits rarely seen works by Richard Prince from his тАЬTime LifeтАЭ years around the theaters, bars, and grind houses of 42nd Street and Times Square. Combining early portraits, advertisements, and finely rendered drawings, the book captures fleeting celebrity, pop culture, and urban spectacle, revealing PrinceтАЩs fascination with identity, performance, and perception in everyday life.тБг
тБг
тБгтБгтБгтБгтАНAvailable at Saint Laurent BabyloneтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
9 rue de Grenelle, ParisтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditionsтБг
@yslтБг
@anthonyvaccarello

@saintlaurentbabylone

The Entertainers, Richard PrinceтБг
Fulton Ryder, 2023тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
The Entertainers revisits rarely seen works by Richard Prince from his тАЬTime LifeтАЭ years around the theaters, bars, and grind houses of 42nd Street and Times Square. Combining early portraits, advertisements, and finely rendered drawings, the book captures fleeting celebrity, pop culture, and urban spectacle, revealing PrinceтАЩs fascination with identity, performance, and perception in everyday life.тБг
тБг
тБгтБгтБгтБгтАНAvailable at Saint Laurent BabyloneтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг

item.author: saintlaurentbabylone

item.title: Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artists...
item.description:
@saintlaurentbabylone

Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artistsтБг
Yale University Press, 2024тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
Swedish Ecstasy explores the visionary world surrounding Hilma af Klint and her artistic circle at the turn of the twentieth century. Bringing together essays and artworks, the book examines how mysticism, spirituality, and scientific thought shaped a generation of Swedish artists. It also highlights the lasting influence of these esoteric ideas on contemporary artistic practices.тБг
тБг
тБгтБгтБгтБгтАНAvailable at Saint Laurent BabyloneтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
9 rue de Grenelle, ParisтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditionsтБг
@yslтБг
@anthonyvaccarello
item.content:encoded:
@saintlaurentbabylone

Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artistsтБг
Yale University Press, 2024тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
Swedish Ecstasy explores the visionary world surrounding Hilma af Klint and her artistic circle at the turn of the twentieth century. Bringing together essays and artworks, the book examines how mysticism, spirituality, and scientific thought shaped a generation of Swedish artists. It also highlights the lasting influence of these esoteric ideas on contemporary artistic practices.тБг
тБг
тБгтБгтБгтБгтАНAvailable at Saint Laurent BabyloneтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг

item.author: saintlaurentbabylone

item.title: Mies van der Rohe: An Architect in His Time, Dietrich NeumannтБг Yale University P...
item.description:
@saintlaurentbabylone

Mies van der Rohe: An Architect in His Time, Dietrich NeumannтБг
Yale University Press, 2024тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
This comprehensive study offers a deeply researched account of the life and career of Ludwig Mies van der Rohe, one of the most influential architects of the twentieth century. Through archival sources and historical analysis, Dietrich Neumann revisits MiesтАЩs iconic projects, from the Farnsworth House to the Seagram Building, while placing his work within its social, political, and architectural context. тБг
тБг
тБгтБгтБгтБгтАНAvailable at Saint Laurent BabyloneтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
9 rue de Grenelle, ParisтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditionsтБг
@yslтБг
@anthonyvaccarello

@saintlaurentbabylone

Mies van der Rohe: An Architect in His Time, Dietrich NeumannтБг
Yale University Press, 2024тБг
Book curation by Anthony VaccarelloтБгтБгтБгтБгтБг
тБг
This comprehensive study offers a deeply researched account of the life and career of Ludwig Mies van der Rohe, one of the most influential architects of the twentieth century. Through archival sources and historical analysis, Dietrich Neumann revisits MiesтАЩs iconic projects, from the Farnsworth House to the Seagram Building, while placing his work within its social, political, and architectural context. тБг
тБг
